cli

Interface FlagHandler

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    LongFlagHandler, ShortFlagHandler

    public interface FlagHandler
    Strategy interface for processing different types of command-line flags.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void handle(common.PeekingIterator<java.lang.String> tokens, FlagRegistry registry, FlagListener observer)
      Processes a flag and its potential arguments.

    • Method Detail

      • handle

        void handle(common.PeekingIterator<java.lang.String> tokens,
            FlagRegistry registry,
            FlagListener observer)
        Processes a flag and its potential arguments.
        Parameters:
        tokens - the iterator over normalised tokens
        registry - the registry to look up rules
        observer - an event-driven listener used to relay any state updates to the caller
